Week 1 · Active · Evolution is Action.
Good morning, Founder

Build the brand.
Week by week.

You are in Week 1 — Lock the Foundation. Premium activewear engineered for evolving bodies. The work starts now.

Week 1 Priority Actions
Finalise brand identity — logo lockup, colour system (#000/#fff/muted greys), typography stack
Write EVOLVEE brand strategy document — pillars, voice, audience archetypes, positioning statement
Confirm hero product: Core Seamless Legging + bra set (squat-proof, curve-graded XS–3XL)
Begin supplier research — seamless knit, squat-proof opacity guarantee, MOQ ≥100, UK delivery
Register evolvee.co.uk + secure @evolvee handles on Instagram and TikTok now
Write brand manifesto — "Evolution is Action" narrative for About page and brand materials
8-Week Launch Progress
